title: REPLACE on a CHECK constraint does not work as advertised
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value INTEGER CHECK(value > 0));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, -1) ON CONFLICT(id) DO NOTHING;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (2, NULL);
key_bug_features: REPLACE operation fails on CHECK constraint
